text: carbs is 69g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

on the plus side. use case can matter more than macros because this category is really about function and trade-offs. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

on the weaker side. basically a sugar spread because the fruit branding does not save it from the real composition. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Jam is D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
